description_long: This is a modern single-story house featuring a flat roof and a spacious open-plan layout. The exterior walls are primarily finished in smooth gray and white surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes a covered outdoor patio area with seating and dining furniture, as well as a small green lawn and a wooden deck with lounge chairs. The interior is visible through the open plan, showing a kitchen, dining, and living area, all furnished in a contemporary style. The structure is composed mainly of concrete, glass, and wood, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living and seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan layout, featuring a covered patio, wooden deck, and green lawn.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway, interior living spaces, and a glimpse of the outdoor patio with seating.
description_view_1: The rear of the house is visible, showing the green lawn, deck, and the back wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the flat roof, side walls, and the transition between the indoor and outdoor areas.
description_view_3: The front of the house is shown, featuring the wooden deck with lounge chairs, green lawn, and the covered patio with dining furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is integrated into the open-plan facade, featuring a simple door with no steps, a covered patio, and minimal decorative elements.
